resources.string: Creḍ akken ma llan amzun ttwaɣran
Ur izmir ara ad d-yaf asnas i usefrek n wanaw-a n yisefka.
Tekki ɣer ticṛet n tesfift akken ad t-id-ternuḍ ɣer da.
Inermisen yettwarnan s ufus zemren ad ttwasqedcen i uḍris n yimayl aklasiki, yerna ur ttwaḍemnen ara tawgelhant seg yixef ɣer wayeḍ.
Sbadu isem n useqdac ara k-d-yettwaseknen deg umkan n \"%1$s\". Eǧǧ ilem akken ad tesqedceḍ isem ufrin n unermis.
Bḍu adeg akked iɛeggalen n ugraw meṛṛa
Iznan n udiwenni-a ttlalen-d deg yibenk-ik·im kken ad d-mlen ileqman akked wuguren n usnas deg useqdec.

❤️ Yettban-iyi-d dakken aql-ik·im tḥemmled Delta Chat!

Ma ulac aɣilif, mudd-d tawsa akken ad tḍemneḍ d akken Delta Chat ad yeqqim baṭel i yal yiwen.

Ma d Delta Chat baṭel i useqdec d uɣbalu yeldin, taneflit tesqam-d idrimen. Mudd-aɣ-d afus ad neḥrez Delta Chat d ilelli u ad t-nerr d imgerrez ugar ɣer zdat.

https://delta.chat/donate
Asifeḍ n imeddayen ad yeǧǧ isnasen-nniḍen deg yibenk-ik·im ad kecmen ɣur-sen.\n\nad tkemmleḍ?

Sewḥel anermis-agi?

Ur d-ttbanen ara yiznan usriden neɣ igrawen i d-yettwaxelqen s yinermisen iweḥlen.

Igrawen-nniḍen yesεan inermisen iweḥlen mazal ad d-sseknen iznan-nsen.
Kkes inermisen?\n\nInermisen s udiwenni i d-iteddun ulamek ara ttwakksen i lebda.
Wiyaḍ ad walin kan agraw-agi ticki tuzneḍ izen amezwaru.
Sit u ṭṭef akken ad teskelseḍ izen n taɣect, serreḥ i tuzna

• Welleh iznan dagi i unekcum fessusen

•Aru tizmilin neɣ takatut n taɣect

• Seddu amidya akken ad ten-teskelseḍ
Ttxil-k-m tazwara qbel asuter n udiwenni.
Issefk ad tiliḍ d aɛeggal deg ugraw akken ad tgeḍ tigawt-a.
Wali ma yella sin n yibenkan-a deg yiwen n uzeṭṭa Wi-Fi neɣ deg yiwen n uẓeṭṭa
Sebded delta Chat ɣef yibenk-ik·im nniḍen (https://get.delta.chat)
Bdu Delta Chat, sit “Sεiɣ yakan amaɣnu / Rnu am yibenk wis sin” sakin ḍumm tangalt i d-yettwaseknen dagi
Ḍumm akken ad tesbeddeḍ ibenk wis sin i %1$s
Deg yibenk amezwaru, ruḥ ɣer \"Iɣewwaṛen / Rnu ibenk wis sin\" sakin ḍumm tangalt i d-yettwaseknen din
Nɣel amaɣnu seg yibenk-nniḍen ɣer yibenk-a?
Amaɣnu i tebɣiḍ ad d-tketreḍ seg lqem amaynut n Delta Chat.\n\nAkken ad tkemleḍ asebded n yibenk wis sin, ma ulac aɣilif leqqem ibenk-agi ɣer lqem aneggaru n Delta Chat.
Sefsex asbadu n yibenk wis sin?
Aya ad yili d arameɣtu i tangalt QR i d-yettwanɣelen ɣer tecfawt.
ℹ️ Amaɣnu yettusiweḍ ɣer yibenk-ik·im wis sin.
Rnu amaɣnu akken ad tkecmeḍ ɣer ugraw \"%1$s\".
Rnu amaɣnu akken ad temmeslayeḍ d %1$s.
Snulfu-d amaɣnu amaynut sakin bdu ameslay akked %1$s?
Snulfu-d amaɣnu amaynut sakin rnu ɣer \"%1$s\"?
Anawen n upṛuksi yettusefraken : HTTP(S), SOCKS5 akked Shadowsocks.
Apṛuksi arameɣtu neɣ ur yettusefrak ara
Aql-ik·im tesseqdaced apṛuksi. Ma tesɛiḍ ugur deg tuqqna, ɛreḍ apṛuksi-nniḍen.

Kkes amedwel "%1$s"?

Inermasen i yessnen kan amedwel-a, ahat ur d-ttawḍen ara ɣur-k·m alarma tuzneḍ-asen izen tikkelt nniḍen.

Ma yella ccek, ffer-it axir n tukksa-ines.
Ma ulac aɣilif, sekcem tansa imayl tameɣtut
Ma ulac aɣilif, sekcem tansa imayl tameɣtut akked wawal uffir
Ur izmir ara ad yeqqen am \"%1$s\". Ma ulac aɣilif, senqed ma yella tansa d wawal uffir d tameɣtut.
Sbadu tabzimt i d-yettbanen kan i kečč·kemm ; mudd-d afus ad temgirrdeḍ gar imeɣna-ik·im.
Tebɣiḍ ad tekkseḍ isefka n umaɣnu-inek·inem?
Akk isefka n umaɣnu n \"%s\" ɣef yibenk-a ad ttwakksen, ula d asebded n uwgelhen seg yixef ɣer yixef, Inermisen, idiwenniyin, iznan akked umidya. Tigawt-a ur tezmir ara ad tuɣal ar deffir.
Beṭṭu ur yedda ara ɣef sebba n tsirag ixuṣṣen.
Deg igrawen igugmen, iznan n telɣut rzuḍ ɣer-k·m, am tririyin neɣ tiririyin n tigawt
Sken agdil n usiwel ɣef yisawalen inekcamen
Ur izmir ara ad isekles aɣmis
Seddu asuddem deg wadig s usuter
Afaylu amedday yegber tiddadanin tudrigin, i ɣ-iεawnen ad nesnerni Delta Chat. Wali https://delta.chat/help#statssending i wugar n telɣut. Tanemmirt-ik·im!
Tuzzna n yizen ur yeddi ara ɣer %1$s.
Tbeddleḍ isem n ugraw seg \"%1$s\" ɣer \"%2$s\".
Isem n ugraw yettusnifel si \"%1$s\" ɣer \"%2$s\" sɣur %3$s.
Tekkseḍ armad n umkud n yiznan ur nettdum ara.
Amkud n yiznan ur nettdum ara yettwasnes sɣur %1$s.
Tesbedḍeḍ amkud n yiznan ur nettdum ara ɣer %1$s n tesdatin
Amkud n yiznan ur nettdum ara yettwasbed ar %1$s n tesdatin sɣur %2$s.
Tesbeddeḍ amkud n yiznan ue nettdum ara ɣer 1 n usrag.
Amkud n yiznan ur nettdum ara yettwasbed ar 1 n usrag sɣur %1$s.
Tesbeddeḍ amkud n yiznan ue nettdum ara ɣer 1 wass.
Amkud n yiznan ur nettdum ara yettwasbed ar 1 wass sɣur %1$s.
Tesbeddeḍ amkud n yiznan ue nettdum ara ɣer 1 umalas.
Amkud n yiznan ur nettdum ara yettwasbed ar 1 umalas sɣur %1$s.
Tesbeddeḍ amkud n yiznan ue nettdum ara ɣer 1 useggas.
Amkud n yiznan ur nettdum ara yettwasbed ar 1 useggas sɣur %1$s.
Tesbeddeḍ amkud n yiznan ue nettdum ara ɣer %1$s n tesdatin.
Amkud n yiznan ur nettdum ara yettwasbed ar %1$s sɣur %2$s.
Tesbeddeḍ amkud n yiznan ue nettdum ara ɣer %1$s n yisragen.
Amkud n yiznan ur nettdum ara yettwasbed ar %1$s n yisragen sɣur %2$s.
Tesbeddeḍ amkud n yiznan ue nettdum ara ɣer %1$s n wussan.
Amkud n yiznan ur nettdum ara yettwasbed ar %1$s n wussan sɣur %2$s.
Tesbeddeḍ amkud n yiznan ue nettdum ara ɣer %1$s n yimalas.
Amkud n yiznan ur nettdum ara yettwasbed ar %1$s n yimalas sɣur %2$s.
Iznan deg udiwenni-a sseqdacen imayl aklasiki, ur ttwawgelhen ara seg yixef ɣer yixef.
Iznan tteddun s wudem n uwgelhen seg yixef ɣer yixef.
Iznan ttwawgelhen seg yixef ɣer yixef. Sit akken ad tissineḍ ugar.

Iznan akk yellan deg udiwenni-a ttwawgelhen seg yixef ɣer yixef.\n\nAwgelhen n yixef ɣer yixef yettaǧǧa iznan d usligen gar-ak·am d yecriken n udiwenni. Ula d iqeddacen, isaǧǧawen neɣ imsawaḍen ur zemren ad ten-ɣren.
⚠️%1$s Yesra awgelhen n yixef ɣer yixef ur nelli ara yakan i udiwenni-a. Sit akken ad tissineḍ ugar.
Akken ad tesbeddeḍ awgelhen n yixef ɣer yixef, tzemreḍ ad temlileḍ inermisen s timmad-nsen u ad ḍummeḍ tangalt-nsen QR akken ad ten-id-tesmendeḍ.
Tekkseḍ adiwenni n \" iznan yettwakelsen \".\n\nℹ️ Akken ad tesqedceḍ tamahilt \" iznan yettwakelsen \", rnu adiwenni amaynut akked yiman-ik·im.

⚠️Asaǧǧaw-ik·im n usekles qrib ad yaččar: %1$s%% yettwaseqdec yakan.

Ahat ur tezmireḍ ara ad d-remseḍ iznan ma yella asekles yeččur.

 👉 Ttxil-k·m senqed ma yella tzemreḍ ad tekkseḍ isefka iqburen deg ugrudem n web n isaǧǧawen syin rmed "Iɣewwaṛen / Idiwenniyen / Kkes iznan iqbuṛen". Tzemreḍ ad tesneqdeḍ aseqdec n usekles-inek·inem amiran deg "Iɣewwaṛen / tuqqna".
⚠️ Azemz neɣ akud deg yibenk-ik·im yettban-d ur iṣeḥḥa ara (%1$s).\n\nṢeggem tamasragt-ik·im ⏰🔧Akken ad neḍmen d akken iznan-ik·im ad ttwaremsen akken iwata.

⚠️Yezmer lḥal alqem-ik·im n Delta Chat d aqbur.

Aya yezmer ad d-yeglu s wuguren acku imendiden-ik·im n udiwenni sseqdacen ileqman imaynuten - yerna txuṣṣeḍ timahilin tineggura 😳
Ttxil-k·m, ssefqed https://get.delta.chat neɣ taḥanut-nnek·nnem n usnas i uleqqem.
Ṭṭef takamra-nnek·nnem nnig n tangalt QR
Tangalt QR ur tezmir ara ad ttwakestengel
Adsil umḍin yettwaḍummen ur imṣada ara akked win yettwaẓerren i tikelt taneggarut i %1$s.
Tangalt-a QR tegber adsil umḍin maca ulac tansa.\n\nI usenqed beṛṛa n tasfift, ttxil-k-im eg tuqqna tawgelhant akked uɣerwaḍ.
Tangalt-a QR tezmer ad tt-id-ḍummen wiyaḍ akken ad k·m-id-nermsen.\n\nTzemreḍ ad talseḍ awennez, akken tangalt QR yellan neɣ aseɣwen n uεraḍ ur iteddu ara.
Tangalt-a QR tezmer ad tt-id-ḍummen wiyaḍ akken ad kecmen ɣer ugraw \"%1$s\".\n\nTzemreḍ ad talseḍ awennez, akken tangalt QR yellan neɣ aseɣwen n uεraḍ ur iteddu ara.
Tangalt-a QR tezmer ad tt-id-ḍummen wiyaḍ akken ad ddun ɣer ubadu \"%1$s\".\n\nTzemreḍ ad talseḍ awennez, akken tangalt QR yellan neɣ aseɣwen n uεraḍ ur iteddu ara.
Tangalt QR tettuwennez, tura dayen ur termid ara.
Ḍumm akken ad tedduḍ ɣer ugraw \"%1$s\"
Ḍumm akken ad tedduḍ ɣer ubadu \"%1$s\"
Ulac tuqqna internet, ur izmir ara ad isebded tangalt QR.
Tangalt QR tettwaḍummen ur tezmir ara ad tettwaseqdec i usebded n umaɣnu amaynut.
%1$s yeɛreḍ-ik·im-id ad d-ternud ɣer ugraw-a.\n\nRǧu ibenk n %2$s ad d-yerr...
%1$s inced-ik·m-id ad tkecmeḍ ɣer ubadu-a.\n\nAṛǧu n yibenk n %2$s akken ad d-yerr tiririt...
%1$s yerra-d, rǧu i tmerna-as ɣer ugraw...
Rmed \"Ḥettem tuqqna n ugilal\" i yilɣa n teflest.
Akken ad d-teṭṭfeḍ tiwlafin neɣ tividyutin, ddu ɣer iɣewwaṛen n usnas, fren \" tisirag \", sakin rmed \" takamirat \".
Akken ad tremseḍ neɣ ad tazneḍ ifuyla, ddu ɣer iɣewwaṛen n usnas, fren \" tisirag \", sakin rmed \" takatut \".
Akken ad teqqneḍ adig, ddu ɣer iɣewwaṛen n usnas, fren \" tisirag \", sakin rmed \" adig \".
Akken ad d-remseḍ ilɣa, ddu ɣer \"Iɣewwaṛen n Unagraw / Isnas / Delta Chat\" akken ad tremdeḍ \"Ilɣa\".
Yesra ad yettwazgel useggem n udɣaɣ, seqdec ma yella ilɣa ur d-ttawḍen ara di lawan.

Akken ad tḥerzeḍ tuqqna daɣen ad d-remseḍ iznan deg ugilal, zgel aseggem n udɣaɣ deg usurif ay d-itteddun.\n\nDelta Chat yesseqdac kra n teɣbula u yernu ur ttḥewwil ara akken ad yečč aṭas deg udɣaɣ-ik·im.
Sit dagi akken ad tremseḍ iznan ticki Delta Chat yella deg ugilal.
Tsirgeḍ yakan Delta Chat i wakken ad d-remseḍ iznan deg ugilal.\n\nMa yella iznan ur d-ttawḍen ara deg ugilal, ttxil-k·m senqed daɣen iɣewwaṛen n unagraw.

D acu i d amaynut?

💯Awgelhen n yixef ɣer yixef d ayen iɣef ara tettekleḍ u i lebda. Inekcaman 🔒 ruḥen!

✉️ Imayl aklasik war awgelhen yettwacreḍ s usekkil azamulan.

 😻 Agdil amaynut yettwasneflin n umaɣnu i akk inermisen-ik·im

🔲 Taqeffalt tamaynutt i unekcum uzrib ɣer yisnasen yettwasqedcen deg udiwenni usrid

❤️ Ma ulac aɣilif mudd-aɣ-d afus akken ad neqqim d imunanen, daɣen ad nkemmel ad d-nawi asnerni: %1$s
